scenario: macOS voice-to-text input tool for power users (programmers, doctors, lawyers) who need high-volume text input. Always running in background, activated via hotkey for quick voice capture sessions. Dark-mode-first, function-driven minimalism. The UI should be nearly monochrome with accent color used only at critical interaction points (recording state, primary CTA). No decoration, no expression — only serving the core action of voice-to-text.
core_actions: Hotkey activation → voice input → auto-paste to active app
